focus: correctness -- inventory + pass A: state-store + injection-plugin

findingDetails.title: Injection max-length option does not cap the rendered active-goal block
findingDetails.claim: Phase 002 claims renderGoalInjection caps output length, but implementation can return a block longer than maxInjectionChars.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Searched tests for maxInjectionChars assertions and found no total block-length assertion.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The option might have been intended as a prompt-subsection budget only, but phase docs say block/output length.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade only if docs are amended to define maxInjectionChars as a soft prompt-subsection budget.
findingDetails.recommendation: Clamp or budget the final rendered block and add a total-length assertion.

traceabilityChecks.spec_code: partial: phases 001-002 checked; phase 002 length cap mismatch found
traceabilityChecks.checklist_evidence: notApplicable: Level 1 phase packets have no checklist.md

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: multi-file plugin and phase-doc review with state persistence and prompt injection behavior

targetSelection.selectionReason: prompt-directed inventory plus correctness pass A on state-store and injection-plugin claims

searchLedger.invariant: State helpers must fail closed on missing session ids, isolate session files, persist atomically, serialize mutations, and expose set/clear helpers.

searchActions.result: helpers require session ids, use hex file paths, write temp+fsync+rename, queue by stateDir/session key, and expose set/clear
tests cover missing session failure, isolated files, status/preview, transform, clear

searchLedger.rationale: phase 001 state-store correctness claims matched the implementation and tests reviewed in pass A
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: verified by direct reads against phase 001 requirements

searchLedger.invariant: Only active goals should render and transform failures should fail open without blocking chat.

searchActions.result: renderGoalInjection returns empty for non-active goals; appendGoalBrief catches all errors
transform delegates to appendGoalBrief only when plugin enabled

searchLedger.rationale: active-status gating and fail-open transform behavior matched phase 002 requirements

searchLedger.hypothesis: renderGoalInjection may cap only the goal_prompt subsection instead of the full injection block promised by phase docs.

searchActions.result: final buildBlock return is not clamped after structural lines are added
only two usages; long injection test lacks total-length assertion

searchLedger.rationale: implementation can exceed the configured maxInjectionChars despite phase docs requiring capped block/output length

title: Injection max-length option does not cap the rendered active-goal block

detail: Phase 001 aligned; Phase 002 has DR-001-P1-001 length-cap mismatch

reason: fail-closed session id, session isolation, atomic writes, mutation queue, and set/clear helpers matched implementation evidence
